text: So bebop this is how you photoshop on paint. You do know how to open it with paint but I'm just doing it from scratch so opening it paints paint and here you will see resize and skew. Click on that select pixels. Okay here it shows the dimensions it's like 12,200 by 5,000 and this is premium A plus I think it was 1464 by something I usually like to take a little bigger than that because if it is on a big screen I would still like it to be crisp so maybe 2500 something around that. So if you just do it okay before you I click on OK and save if you see the Size here is 3.39 MB. I think it will also change the moment I save it. So I'm saving it and now you will see the size reduced to 330kb kilobytes. So yeah this is basically what you have to do for any of the pictures that you have trouble with and that's it basically. Thanks for watching.
